findings.description: The description '検索結果の一覧と各行の更新リンクが表示される' has no basis in the source. The source only provides an image directive (`./_image/10/W11AC0101.png`) with no accompanying textual description of the screen's contents.
findings.source_evidence: Source section contains only: `.. image:: ./_image/10/W11AC0101.png\n :scale: 55` — no text describing what the image shows.
